MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Greentree Property management is present. Represented by Aaron Leavy.
Attorney A. Jeanne Grove appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Paul Kennamer is present.
Attorney Patrick Nakao representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jonathan Polland, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. This case settled, the trial date of July 15, 2013 is vacated. (D501)
